text.title: Symbol Index as Always-Fresh LSP/ctags Artifact Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent uses outdated symbol locations; edits wrong file.
antipattern.root-cause: No CI gate detects stale index.
antipattern.fix: CI step regenerates and diffs; fail build on mismatch.

antipattern.symptom: Agent can't read the index; falls back to grep.
antipattern.root-cause: Index in binary format (compiled SCIP without query layer).
antipattern.fix: Wrap with a CLI returning JSON; agent calls the CLI.

antipattern.symptom: Pre-commit hook takes 30s rebuilding the full index.
antipattern.root-cause: Hook calls full-rebuild command, not incremental.
antipattern.fix: Use the tool's incremental mode (ctags -a / Serena update); full rebuild only nightly.
